description:
## Deep Component Audit — hx-form

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-form/`
**wc-mcp Health Score:** 89 (B)
**Known issues:** _styles, _handleSubmit, _handleReset missing descriptions.

### wc-mcp Tools — USE THESE
- `score_component`, `get_component`, `analyze_accessibility`, `validate_usage`, `list_events`, `get_design_tokens`
- **Report wc-mcp bugs to `/Volumes/Development/booked/wc-tools` board.**

### Audit Scope
1. **Design Tokens** — `--hx-` tokens. Layout spacing. Dark mode.
2. **Accessibility** — WCAG 2.1 AA. Form landmark. Label associations. Error summary. Required fields.
3. **Functionality** — Form submission (native + custom). Reset. Validation (constraint API). FormData collection from custom elements. Nested forms.
4. **TypeScript** — Strict. No `any`. FormData typing.
5. **CSS/Styling** — Shadow DOM. Layout (vertical/horizontal). Spacing. CSS Parts.
6. **CEM Accuracy** — Fix 3 missing descriptions.
7. **Tests** — 80%+ coverage. Submit. Reset. Validation. FormData. Custom elements.
8. **Storybook** — Simple form. Validation. Custom elements. Submit handling.
9. **Drupal Compatibility** — Drupal Form API. AJAX form submission. Twig-friendly.
10. **Portability** — CDN-ready. Form-associated custom elements integration.

### Deliverable
Detailed audit report. Fix CRITICAL+HIGH. Document rest.
title: Deep Audit v2: hx-form
